tool.name: help
tool.description: Explain what the bot can help with and how to use each capability

tool.name: activity_key
tool.description: Request a temporary access key for the activity monitor

tool.name: generate_image
tool.description: Generate an image from a text prompt

prompt.description: Detailed text description of the desired image. Infer from reply target or current message if possible.

negative_prompt.description: Terms to exclude from the generated image (e.g. "blurry, low quality, watermark"). Optional.

parameters.validation: Use the reply target text if present; otherwise use descriptive text from the current message. If no usable image prompt text can be inferred, ask the user what they want generated.

tool.name: generate_image_grok
tool.description: Generate an image using Grok (xAI) from a text prompt
tool.abilityWhen: User wants an image generated using Grok or xAI.

prompt.description: Detailed text description of the desired image.

parameters.validation: Use the reply target text if present; otherwise use descriptive text from the current message.

tool.name: generate_video_grok
tool.description: Generate a short video using Grok (xAI) from a text prompt
tool.abilityWhen: User wants a video generated using Grok or xAI.

prompt.description: Detailed text description of the desired video scene.

parameters.validation: Use the reply target text if present; otherwise use descriptive text from the current message.

examples.example: generate_video_grok a timelapse of a flower blooming

tool.name: get_current_weather
tool.description: Get weather details including current conditions and forecast
tool.abilityWhen: User asks about weather details for a location, including temperature, precipitation, wind, and multi-day outlook.

location.description: City name, region, or US postal code to look up weather for

parameters.validation: Location must be a valid worldwide city name, region, or United States postal code.

tool.name: get_recent_nfl_data
tool.description: Get recent NFL scores or news. Provide a data type: "scores" for game results, "news" for headlines. Optionally add a filter — a date (YYYYMMDD or YYYY-MM-DD) for scores, or a keyword (e.g. team name) for news.
tool.abilityWhen: User asks about NFL scores, game results, news, or headlines.

dataType.description: The kind of NFL data to retrieve: "scores" or "news".

filter.description: Optional filter — date (YYYYMMDD or YYYY-MM-DD) for scores, keyword/team name for news.

parameters.validation: Type must be "scores" or "news". Filter is optional: for scores a date in YYYYMMDD or YYYY-MM-DD format; for news a keyword to narrow results.

tool.name: web_search
tool.description: Search the web for current information using Google
tool.abilityWhen: User needs current or real-time information from the web.

query.description: Concise search term or question suitable for a web search engine

parameters.validation: Query should be a concise search term or question suitable for a web search engine.

tool.name: fetch_webpage
tool.description: Fetch a web page or image by URL and analyze its content
tool.abilityWhen: User provides a URL and wants opinions on its content, or asks about a specific web page or image at a URL
tool.abilityText: Fetches a web page or image from a URL, extracts text content, and provides analysis. Falls back to web search if direct fetch fails.

url.description: The full URL to fetch (must start with http:// or https://)

parameters.validation: URL must start with http:// or https://

tool.name: generate_meme
tool.description: Create meme images from popular templates
tool.abilityWhen: User asks to create or generate a meme image.

template_and_text.description: Output must be: templateName | top text | bottom text. Pick the template whose tone and format best match the subject, mood, or joke the user is going for.

parameters.validation: Output must be: templateName | top text | bottom text. Pick the template whose tone and format best match the subject, mood, or joke the user is going for. If the user names a specific template, use it.

examples.example: generate_meme success kid | finished all my tasks | on a Monday
generate_meme one does not simply | walk into mordor

tool.name: get_meme_templates
tool.description: Get available meme templates. Use when a user asks what meme templates are available or wants to see a list of meme templates.
tool.abilityWhen: User asks what meme templates are available or wants to see a list of meme templates.

tool.name: consult_grok
tool.description: Consult Grok (xAI) for a second opinion or deeper analysis on complex topics
tool.abilityWhen: You need a second opinion on ambiguous or complex reasoning, a deeper dive into a topic beyond basic facts or web searches, or updated/real-time information on current events or evolving trends.

query.description: The full query context to send to Grok, including all relevant details from the conversation

parameters.validation: Pass the full query context as input to ensure Grok has all necessary details. Do not send partial or vague requests.

examples.example: consult_grok What are the latest developments in quantum computing and how do they compare to classical computing advances in 2026?

tool.name: delegate_to_local
tool.description: Delegate the final response pass to the local Ollama model instead of xAI for this turn
tool.abilityWhen: The response should be delegated to and finalized by the local Ollama model rather than xAI, for example when the user prefers a local model perspective or when xAI tools have gathered data but the local model should synthesize.

tool.name: send_to_discord_guild
tool.description: Send a message to a specific channel in a Discord server. Use when the user asks to post or say something in another channel or server.
tool.abilityWhen: User wants to send a message to a specific Discord channel or server.

guild.description: Server/guild name or ID to send the message to

channel.description: Channel name (without #) or ID within the guild

content.description: The message text to send (max 2000 characters)

parameters.validation: Guild and channel must be names or IDs the bot has access to. Content must not be empty.

tool.name: send_to_discord_user
tool.description: Send a direct message (DM) to a Discord user. Use when the user asks to DM or privately message someone.
tool.abilityWhen: User wants to send a direct message or DM to another Discord user.

user.description: Target user's @mention, username, or Discord ID

content.description: The message text to send (max 2000 characters)

parameters.validation: User must share a server with the bot. Cannot DM other bots.

tool.name: get_discord_artifact
tool.description: Retrieve messages from a Discord channel. If message_id is given, returns that specific message. If search is given, finds a message matching the text. If only channel is provided, returns recent channel history (message and image counts governed by configured limits).
tool.abilityWhen: User wants to find, retrieve, or review messages from Discord history or a channel.

channel.description: Channel name or ID to search in (defaults to current channel)

message_id.description: Exact Discord message ID to retrieve

search.description: Text to search for in recent messages (case-insensitive substring match)

parameters.validation: Provide message_id for a specific message, search to find by text, or only channel to retrieve recent history.

tool.name: react_to_message
tool.description: Add an emoji reaction to a message. Use when the user asks to react to a message with an emoji.
tool.abilityWhen: User wants to react to a Discord message with an emoji.

emoji.description: Emoji to react with — unicode emoji (e.g. 👍) or custom emoji name:id

target.description: Text to search for to identify the target message, or "last" for the most recent non-bot message

message_id.description: Exact Discord message ID to react to

parameters.validation: Emoji is required. If neither target nor message_id is provided, reacts to the most recent non-bot message.

tool.name: delete_discord_message
tool.description: Delete one of the bot's own messages. Can target by message_id, channel name/ID, or DM username. Only deletes messages authored by the bot — never other users' messages. When no selector is provided, deletes the bot's most recent message in the current conversation.
tool.abilityWhen: User asks the bot to delete, remove, or unsend one of its own messages.

message_id.description: Exact Discord message ID to delete

channel.description: Channel name (without #) or ID to find the bot's last message in

username.description: Username for a DM conversation to find the bot's last message in

parameters.validation: Only the bot's own messages can be deleted. Provide message_id for a specific message, channel to delete the bot's last message in a guild channel, username for a DM, or nothing to delete the bot's last message in the current conversation.
